name: nimble_agents_list
description:
Browse the catalog of pre-built Nimble agents.

Use this tool as the first step to find an existing agent for a data collection task.
Each agent is purpose-built for a specific website or data type (e.g. Amazon products,
LinkedIn profiles, Google Maps reviews).

Typical workflow: list → get (inspect details) → run (collect data).

Args:
    skip: Offset for pagination. Use 0 for the first page.
    limit: Maximum number of agents to return (1-100).
    query: Short keyword filter (e.g. 'amazon', 'reviews'). Use 1-2 words.

Returns:
    Paginated list of agents with name, description, and pagination metadata.

skip.description: Offset for pagination. Use 0 for the first page.
skip.title: Skip

limit.description: Maximum number of agents to return in one page (1-100).
limit.title: Limit

query.description: Short keyword to filter agents by name or domain (e.g. 'amazon', 'linkedin'). Use 1-2 words for best results.
query.title: Query

agents.description: List of agent objects, each containing name, description, and configuration
agents.title: Agents

curr_count.description: Count of agents in the current page
curr_count.title: Curr Count

outputSchema.description: Paginated list of raw agent/template payloads.
outputSchema.title: PaginatedAgentList
